name: ruixen-spark-chart
title: Ruixen Spark Chart
author: Ruixen UI
description: Scrubs a caller-provided sparkline with pointer, touch, or keyboard input and reports the active value.

changes: Repointed the source utility import to the copied Ruixen utility subset.
Added finite-data and geometry guards, slider semantics, keyboard navigation, touch-safe pointer capture, focus feedback, and caller-owned accessible labeling.
Removed the automatic 800 millisecond draw-in animation and retained only direct scrub feedback.
Copied only the source cn helper and its clsx and tailwind-merge imports, omitting unrelated application metadata, environment, fetch, date, and text helpers.

license.scope: registry/ruixenui/spark-chart.tsx and the cn subset of lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Added bounded input handling and equivalent pointer, touch, focus, and keyboard scrubbing while removing the source load animation.
modifications.reason: Keep the original path-following chart interaction without pointer-only access, invalid geometry, scroll blocking, or frequent decorative motion.

modifications.change: Reduced the source application utility file to the exact cn closure used by the component.
modifications.reason: Avoid shipping unrelated Next-specific application code while preserving the source class-merging behavior.
